titulo: The Real AI Security Risk Isn't Data Leakage. It's What Your Agents Can Do
autor: Güney Yıldız, Contributor, Güney Yıldız, Contributor https://www.forbes.com/sites/guneyyildiz/
resumo: Agentic AI has moved the threat boundary inside the enterprise. Mindgard's Aaron Portnoy explains why authority, not access, is now the primary vulnerability.

titulo: Georgia Tech builds network sandbox to test hospital cyber defenses
resumo: With ARPA-H funding, Georgia Tech researchers are building a platform that emulates a hospital's network, enabling them to identify and fix vulnerabilities without risking patient care.

titulo: Whitehat returns $190K to Renegade hours after hacking the protocol
resumo: A whitehat hacker has returned $190,000 to Arbitrum-based dark pool protocol Renegade hours after breaching one of its deployment smart contracts.
